unlocks.title: 解锁：爆破手
unlocks.description: 解锁高攻击风格角色，初始牌组更偏爆发。
unlocks.descriptionEn: Unlock an aggressive character with a burst-focused starter deck.

unlocks.title: 解锁：工程师
unlocks.description: 解锁能量与防御风格角色，更适合稳定推进。
unlocks.descriptionEn: Unlock an energy and defense character for steadier routes.

unlocks.title: 解锁：深层工具包
unlocks.description: 将灯超载、断层打击、重型支护等高级卡加入奖励池。
unlocks.descriptionEn: Add advanced cards such as Lamp Overdrive, Fault Line, and Bulwark to reward pools.

unlocks.title: 解锁：扩容矿灯
unlocks.description: 所有角色开局矿灯上限 +15，更适合贪高风险路线。
unlocks.descriptionEn: All characters start with +15 maximum lamp oil, supporting riskier routes.
